chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-559 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A No. 1446/25. 02.02.2026. Mr. Qurban Ali Kumbhar, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G Sindh. ***************************************** 1. Application is allowed and matter is restored. The instant Petition pertains to the harassment allegedly caused by the official respondents in league with some private persons. The Petitioner apprehends danger to his life as well as registration of false FIR. Learned counsel, therefore, seeks protection to the Petitioner. Learned A.A.G. Sindh after waiving notice of this Petition, states that no harassment would be caused to the petitioner and the police officials shall act strictly in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant Petition is disposed of with direction to the police officials to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the Petitioner within four corners of law. Let a copy of this order be communicated to respondent No.2, 3 & 4 for compliance. JUDGE Ali.
